# `categorization` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is

## `Category`

```prisma
model Category {
  id                String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId            String
  name              String
  type              String
  color             String
  icon              String
  createdFromImport Boolean   @default(false)
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt
  deletedAt         DateTime?
  user              User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([userId, name, type])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([userId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
